title: BuildScaffold Design Document
description: A design is an ordered list of piece placements. Each piece declares its position, rotation, and connections to other pieces. For grid-locked libraries (e.g. Lego), the validator ensures all overlapping attachment points are connected. For non-grid-locked libraries (e.g. wood), only declared connections exist.

pieces.description: Ordered list of piece placements. Order reflects the build sequence (bottom-up).
Piece IDs belonging to this subassembly

id.description: Unique instance ID within this design

type.description: References a piece ID from the library

position.description: [x, y, z] world position of the piece origin, in library units

rotation.description: [rx, ry, rz] Euler angles in degrees

length_override.description: For variable_length pieces: actual cut length in library units

connections.description: Connections from this piece to other pieces. Each connection declares which face of this piece touches which face of another piece.

face.description: Face of this piece involved in the connection

to_face.description: Face of the other piece involved in the connection

fastener.description: For non-grid-locked connections: fastener type (e.g. screw spec)
